recent_projects.name: pyboot-webmvc
recent_projects.summary: Pyboot-webmvc is an open-source Pyboot extension package An extended WebMVC component built on PyBoot that delivers Spring WebMVC-like features—request mappings, interceptors, and RESTful controllers—out of the box.

recent_projects.name: heatmap_cli
recent_projects.summary: A console program that generates a yearly calendar heatmap.

recent_projects.name: pyboot-commons-redis
recent_projects.summary: Pyboot-commons-redis is an open-source Pyboot utility package that A foundational Redis utils package designed for general-purpose tooling.

recent_projects.name: xsget
recent_projects.summary: Console tools to download online novel and convert to text file

recent_projects.name: django-include-bootstrap
recent_projects.summary: Includes bootstrap css/js and a default template to make it easier to use Bootstrap with Django
recent_projects.author: Paul Traylor

recent_projects.name: vector-vault
recent_projects.summary: Quickly create RAG apps, Agents, and Unleash the full power of AI with Vector Vault
recent_projects.author: VectorVault.io

recent_projects.name: pyboot-datasource
recent_projects.summary: Pyboot-datasource is an open-source Python-extended PyBoot component that delivers Spring-WebMVC-like functionality—automatic request mappings, interceptors, RESTful controllers and view resolution—while retaining Spring's convention-over-configuration experience for Python developers.

recent_projects.name: rxlm
recent_projects.summary: RxNN - RxLM: Reactive Language Models platform
recent_projects.author: Adam Filipek
